message:
fix: box CommandRequest in RemoteRequest, add policy_trace field to
test contexts, and apply minor code quality improvements

Structural and quality improvements across core modules and tests:

crates/frankenterm-core/src/headless_mux_server.rs:
- Box the CommandRequest in RemoteRequest::Command variant to reduce
  enum stack size (CommandRequest is a large type), improving memory
  efficiency and aligning with serde serialization conventions

crates/frankenterm-core/tests/native_mux_reliability_harness.rs:
- Update all CommandRequest construction sites to use Box::new()
  wrapper (5 test sites) matching the new boxed representation
- Add policy_trace: None field to CommandContext test builder to match
  extended struct definition

crates/frankenterm-core/tests/proptest_command_transport.rs:
- Add policy_trace: None to test_ctx() builder for struct completeness

crates/frankenterm-core/src/fleet_launcher.rs:
- Refactor mutable borrow pattern: change parameter from
  Option<&mut DurableStateManager> to mut Option<...> and use
  idiomatic as_mut() instead of ref mut pattern matching

crates/frankenterm-core/src/swarm_pipeline.rs:
- Refactor compensation loop to collect succeeded indices into a Vec
  before iterating, resolving potential borrow checker issues with
  the previous inline iterator approach

crates/frankenterm/src/main.rs:
- Minor formatting: split long if-let and assertion lines for
  readability

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
